title: Convert Image Table to Excel - Extract Data from Photos & Screenshots
metaTitle: Image Table to Excel Converter - Extract Data from Photos
metaDescription: Convert tables from photos and screenshots to Excel spreadsheets. AI-powered OCR extracts data from PNG, JPEG images with 99%+ accuracy on clear tables.
h1: Convert Image Table to Excel Spreadsheet

hero.headline: Extract Tables from Images to Excel in Seconds
hero.subheadline: Upload photos or screenshots of tables and convert them to structured Excel spreadsheets using AI-powered OCR technology.

summary: Transform tables captured in photos, screenshots, or scanned images into editable Excel spreadsheets. Our AI-powered OCR technology recognizes text and table structures from PNG and JPEG images, converting them to structured data with custom field extraction and batch processing capabilities.
whoItsFor: Researchers extracting data from printed reports
Students converting textbook tables for analysis
whenThisIsRelevant: Converting tables from mobile phone photos of documents
Extracting data from screenshot tables shared in presentations
Digitizing printed reports that only exist in image format
Processing multiple table images from field research or surveys
supportedInputs: PNG images of tables from any source
JPEG photos taken with mobile devices or cameras
Screenshots of tables from websites or applications
expectedOutputs: Excel (.xlsx) files with properly formatted table structure
CSV files for easy import into other systems
commonChallenges: Poor image quality making text recognition difficult
Complex table layouts with merged cells or nested structures
Blurry photos or screenshots with insufficient resolution
Tables with mixed fonts, sizes, or orientations in the same image
howItWorksSteps: Upload your PNG or JPEG image containing the table
AI OCR technology scans and identifies text and table structure
Select which fields and columns you want to extract
Download the converted Excel file with your structured data
whyPdfExcelAiFits: OCR technology specifically optimized for table recognition and extraction
Custom field selection lets you choose exactly which data to extract
Batch processing handles multiple table images simultaneously
99%+ accuracy on clear, well-lit images with standard fonts
limitations: Accuracy depends heavily on image quality and lighting conditions
Handwritten tables have limited recognition compared to typed text
Very complex nested tables or unusual layouts may require manual review

faq.question: What image formats work for table conversion?
faq.answer: We support PNG and JPEG images. For best results, use high-resolution images with clear, well-lit tables and standard fonts.

faq.question: Can I convert multiple table images at once?
faq.answer: Yes, our batch processing feature allows you to upload and convert multiple table images simultaneously, saving significant time on large datasets.

faq.question: How accurate is the table extraction from photos?
faq.answer: We achieve 99%+ accuracy on clear images with standard fonts and good lighting. Blurry photos or complex layouts may require manual review of results.

faq.question: Will handwritten tables in images convert properly?
faq.answer: Handwritten text recognition is limited compared to typed text. For best results, use images of printed or digital tables rather than handwritten ones.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
